body:
This PR improves the boss title UI and English name display in both PvE and Rogue gameplay modes.

Changes include:
- Replace Chinese boss names with English display titles
- Add centralized boss display-name mapping utility
- Improve boss info layout to keep all elements aligned on a single row
- Enhance boss title typography with a stronger dark fantasy visual style
- Refine glow, spacing, border, and title pill presentation
- Preserve existing battle, HP, score, and gameplay systems

The update applies to:
- PvE boss display
- Rogue Mode boss display

No backend, database, API, socket, or gameplay logic changes were made.

Verified locally with responsive viewport testing and `npm run build`.

这个 PR 优化了 PvE 与 Rogue 两种模式中的 Boss 名字 UI 与英文显示效果。

改动包括：
- 将中文 Boss 名字替换为英文显示标题
- 新增统一的 Boss display-name 映射工具
- 修复 Boss 信息区域布局，保持单行对齐
- 优化 Boss 名字的 dark fantasy 字体风格
- 调整 glow、间距、边框与 title pill 的视觉表现
- 保持现有战斗、HP、score 与 gameplay 系统不变

本次更新覆盖：
- PvE Boss 显示
- Rogue Mode Boss 显示

未修改：
- backend
- database
- API
- socket
- gameplay logic

已通过本地响应式测试与 `npm run build` 验证。
title: fix(ui): improve boss english title styling
